m2614.description: Gate 1 approval handler: hourly check for approved_gate1 retirement requests. Switches index ILM policy to delete-enabled variant, creates pending_gate2 audit record, opens Gate 2 Kibana Case.

script.source: def buckets = ctx.payload['aggregations']['by_index']['buckets']; for (def b : buckets) { def hits = b['latest_state']['hits']['hits']; if (hits != null && hits.size() > 0 && 'approved_gate1'.equals(hits[0]['_source']['state'])) return true; } return false;

def ilmPolicyMap = ['m2614-logs-l3-no-delete': 'm2614-logs-l3-hot-frozen', 'm2614-logs-l4-no-delete': 'm2614-logs-l4-hot-frozen']; def buckets = ctx.payload['aggregations']['by_index']['buckets']; def approved = []; for (def b : buckets) { def hits = b['latest_state']['hits']['hits']; if (hits == null || hits.size() == 0) continue; def src = hits[0]['_source']; if (!'approved_gate1'.equals(src['state'])) continue; String indexName = src['index_name'].toString(); String origPolicy = src['ilm_policy'] != null ? src['ilm_policy'].toString() : 'unknown'; String deletePolicy = ilmPolicyMap.containsKey(origPolicy) ? ilmPolicyMap[origPolicy] : origPolicy; String approvedBy = src['gate1_approved_by'] != null ? src['gate1_approved_by'].toString() : 'system'; int ageDays = src['phase_age_days'] != null ? (int)(src['phase_age_days']) : 0; String requestId = indexName + '-gate2'; approved.add(['@timestamp': ctx.execution_time, 'request_id': requestId, 'index_name': indexName, 'state': 'pending_gate2', 'created_at': ctx.execution_time, 'updated_at': ctx.execution_time, 'phase_age_days': ageDays, 'ilm_policy': origPolicy, 'delete_policy': deletePolicy, 'ilm_phase': 'frozen', 'gate1_approved_by': approvedBy, 'delete_policy_applied': true, 'watcher_id': ctx.metadata['watcher_id']]); } StringBuilder sb = new StringBuilder(); for (def a : approved) { sb.append('- ').append(a['index_name']).append(' (Gate1 by: ').append(a['gate1_approved_by']).append(', frozen ').append(a['phase_age_days']).append('d) '); } return ['approved': approved, 'approved_count': approved.size(), 'summary_text': sb.toString()];

webhook.body: {"title": "M-26-14 Data Retirement - Gate 2 Deletion Approval Required ({{ctx.payload.approved_count}} index(es))", "description": "Gate 1 has been approved. Indices switched to deletion-enabled ILM. ILM will take a compliance snapshot (wait_for_snapshot) before proceeding. ACTION REQUIRED (Gate 2): Once snapshot is confirmed, authorize final deletion by indexing to m2614-retirement-requests with {state: approved_gate2, index_name: <name>, gate2_approved_by: <username>}. Indices: {{ctx.payload.summary_text}} Verify snapshots: Kibana > Stack Management > Snapshot and Restore.", "tags": ["m2614", "data-retirement", "gate2", "compliance"], "connector": {"id": "none", "name": "none", "type": ".none", "fields": null}, "settings": {"syncAlerts": false}, "severity": "high", "owner": "securitySolution"}
